description: Shared pure-logic kernel library: type system, registry data model, TOML parsing, platform abstraction layer

features.name: Type system definitions
features.description: Defines TraitType enum (int, float, string, bool, bytes, null, any, handle, list, map, optional) and TraitValue enum with JSON conversion

features.name: Registry data model
features.description: Provides TraitToml parsing, TraitEntry structures, and BuiltinTraitDef for build-time TOML embedding

features.name: Platform abstraction layer
features.description: Runtime function pointer table (Platform struct in OnceLock) for dispatch, registry, config, secrets — plus compile-time time abstraction
